metadata.description: Portable goal-orientation and anti-drift system — keep an AI anchored to the goal across long, wandering sessions, in any repository.

runtimeRequirements.note: Zero runtime dependencies. Pure markdown + protocols executed by the agent. Works on Claude Code and Codex.

plugins.name: lodestar
plugins.description: Goal-orientation layer (Blueprint/Mode/Goal/State/GAP/Decision) with an always-on drift check and task-skill bridge.
